members.titleZh: 针对持续性脑震荡后症状年轻患者的多模式症状靶向治疗：一项随机临床试验

hotTopics.title: Randomised three-armed trial investigation of the Copenhagen Achilles tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualised treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture

members.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
members.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后加速度计测量的身体活动：一项前瞻性队列研究

members.title: Randomised three-armed trial investigation of the Copenhagen Achilles tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualised treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture
members.titleZh: 哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）个体化治疗急性跟腱断裂的随机三臂试验研究

items.title: Dry needling and muscle mechanical properties in myofascial trigger points: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis found dry needling effectively alters myofascial mechanical properties in adults with active or latent myofascial trigger points compared to sham or noninvasive treatments.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析证实了干针疗法对肌筋膜触发点机械特性的积极影响。如果你已经在使用干针，这项研究为你提供了更坚实的证据支持，可以向患者或转诊医生解释其生物力学机制。如果你考虑学习干针，这份综述是很好的背景资料。
items.titleZh: 干针疗法与肌筋膜触发点肌肉机械特性：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，与假干预或非侵入性治疗相比，干针疗法能有效改变成人活动性或潜在肌筋膜触发点的肌肉机械特性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the positive effects of dry needling on the mechanical properties of myofascial trigger points. If you are already using dry needling, this study provides you with stronger evidence to explain its biomechanical mechanisms to patients or referring physicians. If you are considering learning dry needling, this review is excellent background material.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: This systematic review explores the effect of the duration of supervised rehabilitation on outcomes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), aiming to improve outcomes and reduce re-injury risk.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述探讨了监督康复持续时间对前交叉韧带重建术后结果的影响。在制定或调整 ACLR 术后康复方案时，你需要参考这类证据来优化患者的功能恢复和降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 监督康复持续时间对前交叉韧带重建术后结果的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述旨在探讨监督康复持续时间对前交叉韧带重建术后结果的影响，以期改善结果并降低再损伤风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review investigates the effect of supervised rehabilitation duration on outcomes after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction. When designing or adjusting ACLR postoperative rehabilitation protocols, you should refer to such evidence to optimize patient functional recovery and reduce re-injury risk.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to the implementation of high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain: a scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies.
items.summary: A scoping review of 37 studies identified physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to the implementation of high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain, highlighting continued use of low-value treatments.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述识别了物理治疗师在慢性疼痛高价值物理治疗实施中的障碍和促成因素。如果你想提升团队在慢性疼痛管理中的循证实践，这些发现提供了具体的干预方向，比如针对过度使用低价值治疗的问题。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师实施慢性疼痛高价值物理治疗的障碍和促成因素：一项包含37项研究的范围综述和叙述性综合
items.summaryZh: 一项对37项研究进行的范围综述，识别了物理治疗师在慢性疼痛高价值物理治疗实施中的障碍和促成因素，并指出低价值治疗的持续使用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review identifies physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to implementing high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain. If you aim to enhance evidence-based practice in chronic pain management within your team, these findings offer specific intervention targets, such as addressing the overuse of low-value treatments.

items.title: Goal attainment scaling for patients with chronic low back pain receiving physical therapist care: a feasibility and reliability study.
items.summary: This study examined the feasibility and reliability of a Goal Attainment Scaling application for chronic low back pain patients (GAS-Back), finding it a promising tool for capturing individual patient experiences.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究检验了目标达成量表 (GAS) 在慢性腰痛患者物理治疗中的可行性和可靠性。如果你正在寻找更能捕捉患者个体经验的评估工具，GAS-Back 提供了一个有前景的选项，可以提高治疗的患者中心性。
items.titleZh: 慢性腰痛患者接受物理治疗护理的目标达成量表应用：一项可行性和可靠性研究
items.summaryZh: 本研究检验了针对慢性腰痛患者（GAS-Back）的目标达成量表应用的可行性和可靠性，发现它是一个捕捉患者个体经验的有前景的工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examined the feasibility and reliability of a Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS) application for chronic low back pain patients receiving physical therapist care. If you are looking for an assessment tool that better captures individual patient experiences, GAS-Back offers a promising option to enhance patient-centered care.

items.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: This prospective cohort study found an association between postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) scores and length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究发现，术后 Mini-BESTest 评分与慢性硬膜下血肿患者的住院时间相关。在评估这类患者时，你应该将 Mini-BESTest 作为预测住院时长和指导早期康复干预的重要工具。
items.titleZh: 慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test 评分与住院时间之间的关联：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性队列研究发现，慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) 评分与住院时间之间存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study found an association between postoperative Mini-BESTest scores and length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma. When assessing these patients, you should use Mini-BESTest as a crucial tool for predicting hospital length of stay and guiding early rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China: A qualitative study.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among 20 community-dwelling adults with spinal cord injury in China, using the COM-B model.
items.titleZh: 中国脊髓损伤个体休闲体育活动的障碍和促成因素：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究使用 COM-B 模型，探讨了中国20名社区居住的脊髓损伤成年个体休闲体育活动的障碍和促成因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China. If you practice in China and provide rehabilitation services to SCI patients, these findings can help you better understand the cultural and social context to design more targeted interventions.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: This prospective cohort study investigated accelerometry-derived physical activity during the first year after Achilles tendon rupture (n=42), exploring its relationship with patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究追踪了跟腱断裂后一年的加速度计物理活动数据。你现在有了更客观的数据来评估患者的活动水平，并将其与患者报告的结果相关联，这有助于你优化重返运动的指导和设定更实际的恢复目标。
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后加速度计测量的身体活动：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性队列研究调查了42名跟腱断裂患者在术后第一年的加速度计测量身体活动情况，并探讨了其与患者报告结局的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study tracked accelerometry-derived physical activity data for one year after Achilles tendon rupture. You now have more objective data to assess patient activity levels and correlate them with patient-reported outcomes, which helps you optimize return-to-sport guidance and set more realistic recovery goals.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: This RCT compared the efficacy of Lung Boost Trainer versus incentive spirometer on pulmonary function in COVID hemiplegic cerebral palsy children, finding the trainer to be superior.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 比较了 Lung Boost Trainer 和激励性肺活量计在脑瘫儿童肺功能改善上的效果。如果你在儿科康复中治疗有肺功能障碍的脑瘫儿童，可以考虑将 Lung Boost Trainer 作为一种潜在的有效干预手段。
items.titleZh: Lung Boost Trainer 与激励性肺活量计对 COVID 偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响；一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验比较了 Lung Boost Trainer 与激励性肺活量计对 COVID 偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响，发现 Lung Boost Trainer 效果更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared the efficacy of the Lung Boost Trainer versus an incentive spirometer on pulmonary function improvement in children with cerebral palsy. If you treat children with cerebral palsy and pulmonary dysfunction in pediatric rehabilitation, you might consider the Lung Boost Trainer as a potentially effective intervention.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Evolving Demographics and Injury Characteristics of US Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury, 1972-2024.
items.summary: This cross-sectional analysis of 37,866 US SCIMS database participants from 1972-2024 examined evolving demographics and injury characteristics of traumatic spinal cord injury, contextualized by US population trends.
items.curatedReason: 这项分析回顾了1972-2024年美国创伤性脊髓损伤患者的人口学和损伤特征演变。了解这些长期趋势，能帮助你预测未来的病例特点，并为康复服务的规划和资源分配提供依据，尤其是在老年患者比例上升的背景下。
items.titleZh: 1972-2024年美国创伤性脊髓损伤患者人口学和损伤特征的演变
items.summaryZh: 这项对1972-2024年美国37,866名脊髓损伤模型系统数据库参与者的横断面分析，研究了创伤性脊髓损伤患者人口学和损伤特征的演变，并结合了美国人口趋势进行情境化分析。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analysis reviewed the evolving demographics and injury characteristics of US traumatic spinal cord injury patients from 1972 to 2024. Understanding these long-term trends can help you anticipate future case profiles and inform the planning and resource allocation of rehabilitation services, especially given the rising proportion of elderly patients.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Phenomenological exploration of perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors in patients with knee osteoarthritis during physiotherapy rehabilitation in a low- and middle-income country.
items.summary: This qualitative study explores the perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors of physiotherapy rehabilitation in patients with knee osteoarthritis in a low- and middle-income country.
items.curatedReason: 本研究通过定性方法探讨了低收入国家骨关节炎患者接受物理治疗康复时的感知、经验、促成因素和抑制因素。在文化敏感的临床实践中，你需要注意这些定性结果，以优化患者依从性和治疗效果。
items.titleZh: 低收入国家膝骨关节炎患者物理治疗康复期间的感知、经验、促成因素和抑制因素的现象学探索
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了低收入和中等收入国家膝骨关节炎患者在接受物理治疗康复期间的感知、经验、促成因素和抑制因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores the perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors of physiotherapy rehabilitation for knee osteoarthritis patients in a low-income country. In culturally sensitive clinical practice, you should consider these qualitative findings to optimize patient adherence and treatment outcomes.

items.title: Moving Forward Together. Part 5: Championing Physical Therapy Allyship and Advocacy for Indigenous Peoples With Musculoskeletal Pain.
items.summary: This article explores the role of allyship and advocacy for physical therapists in improving the musculoskeletal health of Indigenous Peoples, emphasizing social responsibility and equitable care.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论探讨了物理治疗师在支持和倡导原住民肌肉骨骼疼痛患者方面的作用。这是你作为临床医生在社会责任和公平医疗方面需要关注的重要议题，超出了单纯的临床技术范畴。
items.titleZh: 携手前行。第五部分：倡导物理治疗师对原住民肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的支持和倡议
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了物理治疗师在改善原住民肌肉骨骼健康方面的支持和倡议作用，强调了社会责任和公平医疗的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial explores the role of physical therapists in allyship and advocacy for Indigenous Peoples with musculoskeletal pain. This is a crucial issue for you to address as a clinician, focusing on social responsibility and equitable healthcare, extending beyond mere clinical techniques.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study explored patterns of quality-of-life outcomes in a diverse group of rehabilitation patients using latent profile analysis, identifying shared profiles across diagnostic groupings.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究通过潜在剖面分析探索了康复患者生活质量结局的模式。了解不同诊断组患者共享的生活质量体验剖面，能帮助你更精细地定制康复计划，关注到患者的整体福祉。
items.titleZh: 应用潜在剖面分析探索康复患者生活质量结局的模式
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究通过潜在剖面分析，探索了各类康复患者生活质量结局的模式，识别了跨诊断组的共享剖面。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explored patterns of quality-of-life outcomes in rehabilitation patients using latent profile analysis. Understanding shared quality-of-life experience profiles across different diagnostic groups can help you tailor rehabilitation plans more precisely, focusing on patients' overall well-being.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis

items.title: Prevalence of knee pain and factors influencing its risk in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study in 212 ambulatory chronic stroke survivors in Vietnam found gait alterations are associated with knee pain, limiting rehabilitation and reducing quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了步行卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的患病率及影响因素。如果你在康复中遇到卒中患者伴有膝关节疼痛，应该优先评估其步态异常并进行干预，以改善生活质量和康复进程。
items.titleZh: 步行慢性卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的患病率及影响其风险的因素
items.summaryZh: 这项针对越南212名步行慢性卒中幸存者的横断面研究发现，步态改变与膝关节疼痛相关，限制了康复并降低了生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals the prevalence of knee pain and influencing factors among ambulatory chronic stroke survivors. If you encounter stroke patients with knee pain during rehabilitation, you should prioritize assessing and intervening on their gait alterations to improve quality of life and rehabilitation progress.

items.title: Healthcare professionals' perception of prevalence and assessment of mental ill-health in stroke patients with and without aphasia - a national survey.
items.summary: This national survey investigates healthcare professionals' perceptions of prevalence and assessment of mental ill-health in Swedish stroke care, highlighting challenges in patients with aphasia.
items.curatedReason: 这项全国调查揭示了医疗专业人员对卒中患者（无论有无失语症）心理健康问题的看法和评估方式。你作为康复团队的一员，需要意识到失语症患者心理健康评估的挑战，并积极寻求跨专业协作，确保这些患者的心理需求得到充分关注。
items.titleZh: 医疗专业人员对卒中患者（无论有无失语症）心理健康患病率和评估的看法：一项全国调查
items.summaryZh: 这项全国调查旨在探讨医疗专业人员对瑞典卒中护理中卒中患者（无论有无失语症）心理健康患病率和评估的看法，并强调了失语症患者所面临的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national survey reveals healthcare professionals' perceptions and assessment methods for mental ill-health in stroke patients, with and without aphasia. As a member of the rehabilitation team, you need to be aware of the challenges in assessing mental health in aphasic patients and actively seek interprofessional collaboration to ensure these patients' psychological needs are adequately addressed.

items.title: Exploring psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury: a qualitative study.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored lived experiences of psychological flexibility and its processes among adults with spinal cord injury, linking it to better mental health.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入探讨了脊髓损伤成人心理灵活性过程的实际体验。在康复计划中，你可以考虑整合基于心理灵活性原则的干预措施，帮助患者更好地应对困难体验，提升生活质量。
items.titleZh: 探索脊髓损伤成人心理灵活性过程：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了脊髓损伤成人心理灵活性的生活经验及其过程，并将其与更好的心理健康联系起来。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study deeply explores the lived experiences of psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury. In your rehabilitation plans, you might consider integrating interventions based on psychological flexibility principles to help patients better cope with difficult experiences and improve their quality of life.

items.title: National survey of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia.
items.summary: This cross-sectional online survey describes stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia, assessing staffing, session frequency, duration, and insurance coverage in sub-acute settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项全国调查描述了印度尼西亚的卒中康复服务现状。如果你在东南亚地区执业或关注该地区康复服务发展，这份报告提供了重要的基线数据，可用于比较和改进服务供给，但其结论不直接适用于其他国家的实践。
items.titleZh: 印度尼西亚卒中康复服务全国调查
items.summaryZh: 这项在线横断面调查描述了印度尼西亚的卒中康复服务，评估了亚急性期卒中康复服务的人员配置、治疗频率、持续时间和保险覆盖情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national survey describes the current state of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia. If you practice in Southeast Asia or focus on rehabilitation service development in the region, this report provides important baseline data for comparing and improving service delivery, but its conclusions are not directly applicable to practices in other countries.

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: This structured review evaluates postoperative rehabilitation protocols for patellar instability surgery and compares published recommendations with guidance generated by selected artificial intelligence platforms.
items.curatedReason: 这篇结构化综述评估了髌骨不稳定手术后的康复方案，并将其与 AI 生成的指南进行比较。虽然 AI 辅助决策工具前景广阔，但你仍应以现有最佳证据为核心，审慎评估 AI 建议，而非盲目采纳。
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳定手术后的康复方案：已发表建议和 AI 生成指南的结构化综述
items.summaryZh: 这项结构化综述评估了髌骨不稳定手术后的康复方案，并将已发表的建议与选定人工智能平台生成的指南进行了比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This structured review evaluates rehabilitation protocols after patellar instability surgery and compares them with AI-generated guidance. While AI-assisted decision tools are promising, you should prioritize existing best evidence, critically evaluate AI recommendations, and not adopt them blindly.

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: This prospective cohort pilot study evaluated a 12-week community-based power training program for youth with cerebral palsy, showing positive effects on goal performance, gait speed, and anaerobic capacity.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列预试验评估了社区抵抗力强化个人训练 (RIPT) 项目对脑瘫青少年的效果。虽然是试点研究，但其积极结果提示，社区力量训练可能是脑瘫青少年改善运动功能和生活质量的可行途径，值得你进一步关注和探索。
items.titleZh: 脑瘫青少年社区抵抗力强化个人训练 (RIPT) 项目：一项前瞻性队列预试验
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性队列预试验评估了一项为期12周的社区力量训练项目对脑瘫青少年的效果，结果显示对目标表现、步速和无氧能力均有积极影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort pilot study evaluated the effects of a community-based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) program for youth with cerebral palsy. Although a pilot study, its positive results suggest that community-based strength training may be a feasible avenue for improving motor function and quality of life in adolescents with cerebral palsy, warranting your further attention and exploration.

items.title: Ischemic preconditioning alters gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis.
items.summary: This study found that a single session of ischemic preconditioning altered gait mechanics in 30 older adults with knee osteoarthritis, offering a potential non-exercise intervention.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现局部缺血预处理可改变膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学。如果你在寻找非运动干预来改善步态，这项研究提供了一个新的方向，但其单次干预的效果和长期临床意义仍需更多研究验证。
items.titleZh: 局部缺血预处理改变膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，单次局部缺血预处理能改变30名膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学，提供了一种潜在的非运动干预方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that ischemic preconditioning alters gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis. If you are looking for non-exercise interventions to improve gait, this study offers a new direction, but the effects of a single intervention and its long-term clinical significance still require more research for validation.

items.title: Rehabilitation Utilizing Blood Flow Restriction Following Surgical Repair of a Bankart Lesion with a Buford Complex in an Elite High School Football Player: A Case Report.
items.summary: This case report describes the rehabilitation utilizing blood flow restriction following surgical repair of a Bankart lesion with a Buford complex in an elite high school football player, addressing a rare combined pathology.
items.curatedReason: 这是一篇关于 Bankart 损伤合并 Buford 复合体修复术后应用血流限制训练的病例报告。虽然血流限制训练值得关注，但作为单个病例报告，它只能提供初步线索，不能作为你调整常规康复方案的依据。
items.titleZh: 精英高中橄榄球运动员 Bankart 损伤合并 Buford 复合体手术修复后应用血流限制康复：一例病例报告
items.summaryZh: 本病例报告描述了一名精英高中橄榄球运动员在 Bankart 损伤合并 Buford 复合体手术修复后，采用血流限制康复的案例，旨在解决这种罕见合并病理的康复问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a case report on the use of blood flow restriction training after Bankart lesion repair with a Buford complex. While blood flow restriction training is noteworthy, as a single case report, it provides only preliminary insights and should not be the basis for adjusting your routine rehabilitation protocols.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Early Neuromuscular and Co-activation Patterns After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction In Males: A Case-control Exploratory Feasibility Study.
items.summary: This exploratory feasibility study investigated early neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after ACLR in males, highlighting arthrogenic muscle inhibition as a barrier to muscle recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项探索性可行性研究，探讨了男性 ACLR 术后早期的神经肌肉和协同激活模式。虽然提供了对关节源性肌肉抑制的早期见解，但作为小样本可行性研究，其结论仍需大规模研究验证，不应作为你立即调整临床实践的依据。
items.titleZh: 男性前交叉韧带重建术后早期神经肌肉和协同激活模式：一项病例对照探索性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项探索性可行性研究调查了男性 ACLR 术后早期的神经肌肉和协同激活模式，强调关节源性肌肉抑制是肌肉恢复的主要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an exploratory feasibility study on early neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after ACLR in males. While it offers early insights into arthrogenic muscle inhibition, as a small-sample feasibility study, its conclusions require validation from larger studies and should not be used as an immediate basis for adjusting your clinical practice.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Preventative strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players: A scoping review.
items.summary: This scoping review mapped the range of preventative strategies used to reduce non-contact lower limb injuries among male footballers, identifying key areas for intervention.
items.curatedReason: 这是一篇范围综述，旨在总结足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略。如果你在运动康复领域工作，这些信息可以作为你制定预防方案的起点，但要记住范围综述的证据等级相对较低，需要进一步参考更高质量的系统综述和指南。
items.titleZh: 男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述梳理了旨在减少男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略，识别了关键干预领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a scoping review summarizing preventive strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries in male football players. If you work in sports rehabilitation, this information can serve as a starting point for developing preventive programs, but remember that scoping reviews have a relatively low level of evidence; you should also refer to higher-quality systematic reviews and guidelines.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review found that early rehabilitation (motion within 14 days) after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) leads to better functional outcomes without increasing complications, compared to delayed programs (motion after 28 days).
items.curatedReason: 关于反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后康复，这项系统综述发现，与延迟康复相比，早期康复（14天内开始活动）能带来更好的功能结局，且并发症发生率无显著差异。这支持早期活动作为 rTSA 术后康复的优选方案。
items.titleZh: 反式全肩关节置换术后早期与传统康复的功能结局及并发症系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述发现，与延迟康复（28天后活动）相比，反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后早期康复（14天内活动）可带来更好的功能结局，且并发症无显著增加。
items.curatedReasonEn: For reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) postoperative rehabilitation, this systematic review found that early rehabilitation (motion within 14 days) leads to better functional outcomes with no significant difference in complication rates compared to delayed programs. This supports early motion as the preferred approach for rTSA.

items.title: Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) to Recover Arm Activity After Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized, sham-controlled trial (N=76) found that home-based Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) significantly improved arm activity and reduced abnormal co-activation in chronic stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，可穿戴肌电界面神经康复（MINT）系统可有效减少卒中后手臂异常共激活并改善手臂活动。这是卒中康复技术的一项重要进展，你应关注这类家庭可用的技术在促进功能恢复上的潜力。
items.titleZh: 可穿戴肌电神经康复界面（MINT）用于卒中后手臂活动恢复：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、假对照试验（N=76）发现，居家使用的可穿戴肌电神经康复界面（MINT）能显著改善慢性卒中幸存者的手臂活动，并减少异常协同激活。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial demonstrates that the Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) system effectively reduces abnormal co-activation and improves arm activity after stroke. This is a significant advancement in stroke rehabilitation technology, and you should pay attention to the potential of such home-based technologies in promoting functional recovery.

items.title: Sit-to-stand test emerges as a powerful prognostic factor of future health outcomes: different versions, measurement properties and future perspectives
items.summary: A recent meta-analysis highlighted the sit-to-stand test as a powerful prognostic factor for multiple long-term health conditions in adults and older adults, suggesting its strong value among simple muscular strength tests.
items.curatedReason: 这篇 BJSM 的文章强调了“坐立测试”在预测长期健康状况方面的强大预后价值。你应将其作为一种简单有效的现场测试，常规纳入你的患者评估流程中。
items.titleZh: 坐立测试成为未来健康结果的强大预后因素：不同版本、测量特性及未来展望
items.summaryZh: 一项最新荟萃分析指出，坐立测试在预测成人和老年人多种长期健康状况方面具有强大的预后价值，表明其在简单肌肉力量测试中具有重要意义。
items.curatedReasonEn: This BJSM article highlights the strong prognostic value of the sit-to-stand test for predicting long-term health outcomes. You should regularly incorporate it into your patient assessment process as a simple and effective field-based test.

items.title: Multimodal symptom-targeted treatment for young people with persisting post-concussion symptoms: a randomised clinical trial
items.summary: A single-site, open-label, assessor-blinded, parallel-group randomized clinical trial is evaluating the effectiveness of Concussion Essentials (CE), a symptom-targeted, multidisciplinary treatment for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS) in 8–18-year-olds.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机临床试验评估了“脑震荡要点”（Concussion Essentials, CE）多学科治疗方案对持续性脑震荡后症状 (PPCS) 的有效性。如果试验结果积极，这将为你提供一个针对青少年 PPCS 的循证、结构化干预方案，改变你对这类复杂病例的管理方式。
items.titleZh: 针对持续性脑震荡后症状年轻患者的多模式症状靶向治疗：一项随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单中心、开放标签、评估者盲法、平行组随机临床试验正在评估“脑震荡要点”（CE），一种针对8-18岁儿童持续性脑震荡后症状（PPCS）的多学科症状靶向治疗的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized clinical trial evaluates the effectiveness of the "Concussion Essentials" (CE) multidisciplinary treatment for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS). If the trial results are positive, this will provide you with an evidence-based, structured intervention program for adolescent PPCS, changing how you manage these complex cases.

items.title: Long-term resistance training with all-cause and cause-specific mortality: assessing dose-response and joint associations with aerobic physical activity
items.summary: A study across three large prospective cohorts (N>100,000) investigated the association between long-term resistance training and lower all-cause and cause-specific mortality, assessing dose-response and joint effects with aerobic activity.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对三个大型前瞻性队列的研究，评估了长期阻力训练与全因和特定原因死亡率的关系，并探讨了剂量反应和与有氧活动的联合效应。这将为你提供强有力的证据，支持将阻力训练纳入患者的长期健康管理方案中，并指导剂量安排。
items.titleZh: 长期阻力训练与全因和特定原因死亡率：评估剂量反应和与有氧活动的联合关联
items.summaryZh: 一项针对三个大型前瞻性队列（N>100,000）的研究，调查了长期阻力训练与较低的全因和特定原因死亡率之间的关联，并评估了剂量反应以及与有氧活动的联合效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study across three large prospective cohorts evaluated the relationship between long-term resistance training and all-cause and cause-specific mortality, exploring dose-response and joint effects with aerobic activity. This will provide you with strong evidence to support integrating resistance training into patients' long-term health management plans and guide dosing.

items.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found that exercise-based interventions effectively reduce pain and improve function in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析再次确认，运动干预对中老年肩袖相关肩痛患者的疼痛和功能均有效。你应继续将运动疗法作为这类患者的一线干预措施。
items.titleZh: 中老年人肩袖相关肩痛的运动干预：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，基于运动的干预措施能有效减轻中老年肩袖相关肩痛患者的疼痛并改善其功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis reconfirms that exercise interventions are effective for both pain and function in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain. You should continue to prioritize exercise therapy as a first-line intervention for these patients.

items.title: Diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test in individuals with stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) cutoff values in individuals with stroke for various reference standards.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）和 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test（Mini-BESTest）在卒中患者中的诊断和预后准确性。你应根据其推荐的参考标准，审慎选择并在临床上应用这些量表进行平衡评估。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者 Berg 平衡量表和 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test 的诊断和预后准确性：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析研究了 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）和 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test（Mini-BESTest）在卒中患者中不同参考标准的诊断和预后准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluates the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) in stroke individuals. You should carefully select and apply these scales for balance assessment in clinical practice, guided by their recommended reference standards.

items.title: Randomised three-armed trial investigation of the Copenhagen Achilles tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualised treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture
items.summary: A multicenter, three-arm randomized controlled trial is investigating whether individualized treatment using the Copenhagen Achilles Tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) is superior to default operative or non-operative strategies for acute Achilles tendon rupture.
items.curatedReason: 这项三臂随机对照试验评估了哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）的个体化治疗方案。如果研究结果能证明个体化治疗的优越性，你应考虑将其作为跟腱断裂患者管理的新决策工具。
items.titleZh: 哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）个体化治疗急性跟腱断裂的随机三臂试验研究
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心、三臂随机对照试验正在研究使用哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）进行个体化治疗是否优于急性跟腱断裂的常规手术或非手术策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: This three-arm randomized controlled trial evaluates the individualized treatment approach of the Copenhagen Achilles Tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA). If the results demonstrate the superiority of individualized treatment, you should consider it a new decision-making tool for managing Achilles tendon rupture patients.
